subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who desireth to quaff from the ocean of divine knowledge, in the name of his Lord, the Omnipotent, the Almighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم للذی اراد ان یشرب من بحر العرفان باسم ربه المقتدر القدیر
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
